PreToolUse.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8');const blocked=['.env','credentials','.secret'];const fp=(JSON.parse(d).file_path||'').toLowerCase();if(blocked.some(b=>fp.includes(b))){console.error('BLOCKED: Cannot edit sensitive file: '+fp);process.exit(1)}"
PreToolUse.description: Block edits to .env, credentials, and secrets
